Teja Teppala

Ph.D. Candidate in Astronomy | Researcher | Science Communicator

Home Research Outreach CV Personal
Hi! I'm Teja Teppala, a graduate student in the Department of Physics and Astronomy at the University of Missouri - Columbia. I'm from Visakhapatnam, India. I use he/him pronouns. My research focuses on star-formation in galaxies 100 - 1000 less massive than our Milky Way Galaxy. More information about me can be found on my personal and updates pages.
If you're interested in getting in touch, my email is ttgbk@mail.missouri.edu. My office is in Room 228, Physics Building on the University of Missouri campus.
This page was generated by GitHub Pages using a modified version of the Cayman theme by Jason Long. It was last updated on March 18, 2024.
